Package index

Define and solve a problem

lp_problem()
Create a Linear Problem
lp_variable() lp_var()
Add a Variable to an lp_problem()
lp_minimize() lp_maximize() lp_min() lp_max()
Set an Objective Function
lp_constraint() lp_con() lp_subject_to()
Add Constraints to an lp_problem()
lp_delete_constraint()
Delete Constraints
lp_alias() lp_implicit_variable() lp_impvar()
Define an Alias or Implicit Variable (IMPVAR)
lp_fix_vars()
Fix Variables to a Value
lp_minimize_function() lp_maximize_function() lp_min_fun() lp_max_fun()
Set a General Nonlinear Objective Function
lp_solve() lp_find_feasible()
Solve a Linear Problem

Utilities

sum_over()
Index Based Summation
parameter()
Set Dimensions and Names for Parameters
lpsugar_applicable_solvers() lpsugar_available_solvers()
List Applicable and Available Solvers

Bind variables or constraints

bind_vars()
Concatenate Variables and Numbers.
bind_cons()
Define Multiple Constraints at Once

Analyse the solution

solution_summary() constraint_summary() bound_summary() compute_objective() compute_aliases()
Compute a Summary of a Solution or Point

Manually solve a problem

reexports as.OP ROI_solve
Objects exported from other packages
as.OP(<lp_problem>)
Create a ROI::OP() Object.
pretty_solution()
Prettify the Solution of a Model.
